channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Arsenal and Atletico Madrid in transfer tug-of-war over Julian Alvarez
item.description: Arsenal has intensified its pursuit of Atletico Madrid forward Julian Alvarez, aiming to finalize the transfer before pre-season begins. The Gunners are capitalizing on Atletico's refusal to sell to B...

item.title: Regional media decline contributes to misinformation and political rise
item.description: The article highlights the collapse of regional media in Australia, driven by declining investment, job cuts, and the centralisation of newsrooms. This exodus has created an environment ripe for misin...

item.title: Palace Condemns Davao Mayor's Alleged False Claims
item.description: The Philippine government's Palace has strongly condemned the actions of a certain individual named Baste, accusing the Davao City mayor of disseminating false information. This statement comes amid o...

item.title: Leadership Crisis at Federal Agency as Replacement Dispute Persists
item.description: A leadership crisis is unfolding in the Border Communities Development Agency (BCDA) over conflicting appointments. Governorship aspirant Dakorinama Alabo George, who resigned to contest for a Rivers ...

item.title: Tragedy as Child Drowns in Calgary Pond
item.description: A child drowned in a pond in the Legacy neighbourhood of Calgary on Sunday afternoon, according to Emergency Health Services (EHS) and the Calgary Fire Department (CFD). The incident occurred around 1...

item.title: Leadership crisis at BCDA: Wike's ally defies Tinubu's directive to stay in office
item.description: A leadership crisis is brewing at the Border Communities Development Agency (BCDA) as Dr Dakorinama Alabo George, a governorship aspirant under the APC in Rivers State, remains in office despite being...

item.title: Sam Neill, Jurassic Park Star, Passes Away at 78 After Cancer Battle
item.description: Sam Neill, the iconic actor known for his role as Dr. Alan Grant in Jurassic Park, has passed away at 78 after a courageous battle with cancer. His family confirmed his death on Monday, 13 July, in Sy...

item.title: Madlanga Commission Continues Inquiry into Criminal Justice Corruption
item.description: The Madlanga commission of inquiry into allegations of corruption within the criminal justice system is ongoing, with proceedings continuing on Monday, July 13, 2026. The commission, established to in...

item.title: Philippines and China Continue Maritime Dispute Tensions
item.description: Philippine Coast Guard spokesperson Jay Tarriela responded to Chinese Embassy Deputy Spokesperson Guo Wei's comments, accusing China of escalating tensions through illegal activities in the West Phili...

item.title: Minister Calls for Men's Active Role in Women's Empowerment at OIC Conference
item.description: Law and Human Rights Minister Azam Nazeer Tarar emphasized the necessity of men's active participation in advancing gender equality during his address at the OIC's 9th Ministerial Conference on Women ...

item.title: Jayden Adams' Father Shares Grief After Son's Sudden Passing
item.description: Juanito Adams, father of late South African footballer Jayden Adams, has opened up about his son's tragic death at 25. The midfielder passed away at a property in Cape Town just two weeks after repres...

item.title: New Zealand Actor Sam Neill Dies at 78 After Cancer Recovery
item.description: New Zealand actor Sam Neill passed away suddenly at the age of 78 on Monday, July 13, 2026, following his recovery from stage-three blood cancer. His family announced his death in a statement shared o...

item.title: TIB Development Bank Funds Tanzania’s 2050 Vision Infrastructure
item.description: Tanzania's Vision 2050, or Dira 2050, aims to transform the economy into a competitive force. The TIB Development Bank plays a vital role in bridging long-term policy goals with capital for infrastruc...

item.title: Law Minister Azam Tarar Emphasizes Men's Role in Advancing Women's Equality
item.description: Law and Human Rights Minister Azam Nazeer Tarar addressed the OIC's 9th Ministerial Conference on Women, emphasizing that men's active participation is crucial for achieving gender equality. Hosting t...

item.title: Nepal Leads as Top Source of International Students in India According to Latest AISHE Report
item.description: According to the All India Survey on Higher Education (AISHE) report for the academic year 2023-24, Nepal has emerged as the largest source of international students studying in India. The neighbourin...

item.description: Chief Minister Omar Abdullah of Jammu and Kashmir has publicly questioned the Union government's delay in restoring statehood to the region, suggesting that the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP)-led govern...

item.description: The article details the escalating conflict between the United States and Iran, marked by a series of military strikes and diplomatic clashes. U.S. President Donald Trump authorized strikes against Ir...

item.title: Economic Exclusion and Unaddressed Grievances Drive Tanzanian Youth Toward Extremism
item.description: The article discusses a panel discussion at the Tanzania Democracy Forum where experts highlighted how economic exclusion and unaddressed grievances are major factors pushing Tanzanian youth toward ex...

item.title: A Cleaner's Mission: Transforming Lives Through Mental Health Support
item.description: Beaumont, a dedicated cleaner, has become a beacon of hope for individuals in dire living conditions, linking their struggles to mental health challenges. Her work involves tackling extreme environmen...

item.title: Celebrated New Zealand Actor Sam Neill Dies at 78 After Battle with Cancer
item.description: Sam Neill, the acclaimed New Zealand actor renowned for his roles in 'Jurassic Park' and 'Peaky Blinders', has passed away at the age of 78. His family confirmed his death on social media, stating he ...
